headline: Albemarle (ALB) Stock May Be 45% Undervalued Following Citi Upgrade
summary: Albemarle's share price has more than doubled over the past year, yet there is a clear tension in how the stock is priced today, with the Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) intrinsic value estimate pointing to meaningful undervaluation while market based multiples lean the other way. Albemarle has delivered a 102.9% return over the past 12 months, which puts recent share price weakness into the context of a strong one year run. Analyst upgrades tied to lithium demand and earnings momentum can...
